meta.project: ระบบการลา online

product_overview: An online leave and attendance system that lets employees record check-in/out with a webcam, submit and manage leave requests, edit profiles, and lets admins view dashboard summaries and monthly attendance reports.
core_goals: Create and authenticate user accounts so employees can access protected features
Record daily attendance (check-in and check-out) using the device camera
Submit, view, and manage leave requests
Allow users to view and update their profile information
Provide admins with a dashboard summarizing attendance, leaves, and 7-day trends
Enable viewing of monthly attendance reports for review and auditing

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow users to register new accounts and sign in to access protected parts of the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See authenticated dashboard or landing page
Navigate to /register -> Fill in name -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit registration form -> See onboarding or logged-in landing page
Navigate to /register -> Fill in name -> Fill in email -> Leave password blank -> Submit registration form -> See validation error indicating required password

features.name: Profile Management
features.description: View and update personal profile information and account settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> Edit profile fields (name, email, other profile details) -> Submit profile changes -> See updated profile
Navigate to /profile -> Update password fields with mismatched passwords -> Submit profile changes -> See validation error about password mismatch

features.name: Attendance Management (Check-in / Check-out)
features.description: Record attendance by capturing a photo from the web camera and marking check-in or check-out.
user_flows: Navigate to /attendance/check-in-out -> Capture photo using web camera -> Select check-in -> Submit attendance -> See confirmation of successful check-in
Navigate to /attendance/check-in-out -> Capture photo using web camera -> Select check-out -> Submit attendance -> See confirmation of successful check-out
Navigate to /attendance/check-in-out -> Attempt to submit without capturing a photo -> Submit attendance -> See validation error indicating photo is required

features.name: Leave Request Management
features.description: Submit and review leave requests; users can create new requests and see their leave list.
user_flows: Navigate to /leave -> Enter leave dates and reason -> Submit leave request -> See new leave request listed
Navigate to /leave -> Enter leave dates leaving required date fields empty -> Submit leave request -> See validation error indicating required dates

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: For admins: view high-level KPIs, a 7-day attendance trend, and recent leave requests to monitor team status.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View KPI cards for total employees, attendance, and leaves -> View 7-Day Attendance Trend chart -> View recent leave requests list
Navigate to /dashboard as non-admin -> See access denied or insufficient permissions message

features.name: Monthly Attendance Reports
features.description: Browse monthly attendance reports for review and export-ready inspection.
user_flows: Navigate to /reports -> Select month or reporting period -> View monthly attendance report summary and details

features.name: User Authentication
user_interactions: Click Sign In or Register button

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: View summarized attendance data and 7-day trends
user_interactions: View KPI cards for total employees, attendance, and leaves

features.name: Attendance Management
features.description: Recording check-in and check-out via web camera
